boundary: WPSG may know WP Codebox, but must not know Data Machine or Data Machine Code outside explicit transitional quarantine.

.github/datamachine-boundary-quarantine..reason: The quarantine manifest necessarily names the prohibited boundary terms and classified references.

docs/datamachine-boundary.md.reason: Boundary documentation necessarily names the prohibited terms.

tests/scripts/test-datamachine-boundary..reason: The enforcement test necessarily names the prohibited boundary terms.
